context: Agent must rewrite a CONTRIBUTING.md draft to fix passive voice, wordy phrases, vague instructions, and missing code fence language tags.

checklist.name: active_voice
checklist.description: No remaining passive constructions like 'should be run', 'should be filled out', 'should be followed'.

checklist.name: no_wordy_phrases
checklist.description: Wordy phrases removed: 'In order to', 'It is important to note that', 'it is necessary to', 'do not hesitate to'.

checklist.name: specific_instructions
checklist.description: Commands are concrete (e.g., 'Run npm install' not 'run the appropriate command').

checklist.name: code_fences_tagged
checklist.description: Every fenced code block has a language identifier (e.g., bash).

checklist.name: direct_address
checklist.description: Instructions use imperative mood or 'you' instead of 'one' or passive constructions.

checklist.name: structure_preserved
checklist.description: All original sections, headings, and technical content are unchanged.
